message:
fix(session,providers): stream JSONL migration instead of read_to_string, retry OAuth send on full channel, cache Kimi device ID

Session migration (src/session.rs):
Replace read_to_string + lines() with BufReader::read_line() loop in
migrate_dry_run() and jsonl_has_entry_lines() so large JSONL session
files are streamed line-by-line instead of loaded entirely into memory.
Fixes OOM risk on large session files.

OAuth callback (src/interactive/commands.rs):
Replace fire-and-forget try_send with a retry loop that sleeps 50ms on
channel-full, preventing silent message loss when the event channel is
temporarily backpressured during OAuth callback delivery.

Kimi device ID (src/providers/anthropic.rs):
Wrap kimi_device_id() body in OnceLock::get_or_init so the UUID is
generated/read from disk exactly once per process, avoiding redundant
filesystem reads and potential UUID regeneration on concurrent calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
